landing.tagline: Know what's due, before it's due
landing.headline: Your upcoming payments, beautifully organized
landing.description: Track subscriptions, rent, loans, and one-off bills. See exactly what you'll owe each month — clean, calm, and always at a glance.

byMonth.title: By month
byMonth.desc: See totals and due dates at a glance

insights.title: Insights
insights.desc: Charts to spot where money goes

what.question: What is ahead?
what.answer: A simple app to track upcoming payments — subscriptions, rent, loans, and one-off bills — organized by month. You enter amounts and dates yourself.

bank.question: Does it connect to my bank?
bank.answer: No. ahead does not read your bank account or move money. Everything you see is what you choose to add.

free.question: Is it free?
free.answer: Yes, for personal use. We may introduce paid plans later, but the core tracker will stay straightforward.

privacy.question: Who can see my data?
privacy.answer: Only you. Your payments are private to your account and protected by database-level access controls.

delete.question: How do I delete my account?
delete.answer: Go to Me → Delete account, confirm with your email, and your data is permanently removed. You can also email us if you need help.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to see your upcoming payments
auth.name: Name
auth.passwordPlaceholder: At least 8 characters with a letter and number
auth.privacyAgree: By creating an account, you agree to our <link>Privacy Policy</link>.
auth.accountCreated: Account created. You can sign in now.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account before signing in.
auth.checkEmailBanner: We sent you a confirmation link. Open it, then sign in here. Google sign-in does not require this step.
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email first. Check your inbox for the confirmation link.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.paymentCount: {count, plural, one {# payment this month} other {# payments this month}}
dashboard.horizonCount: {count, plural, one {# payment in the next {days} days} other {# payments in the next {days} days}}
dashboard.pastDueCount: {count, plural, one {# past due} other {# past due}}
dashboard.emptyHorizon: Nothing due in the next {days} days
dashboard.emptyGetStarted: Add your first subscription, rent, or bill to get started.

payments.name: Name
payments.useLastDayOfMonth: Use last day of month instead
payments.installmentPending: {amount} left · {count, plural, one {# installment} other {# installments}}
payments.deleteConfirm: Delete this payment? This cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.addCategoryDescription: Give your category a name and pick a color.
settings.privacyCookiesDesc: Review how we handle your data and update your cookie preferences at any time.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose light, dark, or match your device settings.

privacy.title: Privacy display
privacy.description: Hide real amounts when showing the app to someone else. Numbers stay masked on this device until you turn it off.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language for the app interface. Your categories and payment names stay as you enter them.
language.detectedNote: We detected {language} from your device when you signed up.

profile.title: Profile
profile.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all payment data. This cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountConfirmDesc: Type your email address to confirm. All your payments, categories, and profile data will be permanently removed.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.detectedSave: Detected from your device. Save your profile to keep this timezone.

consent.title: Cookies & privacy
consent.description: We use essential cookies for sign-in, language, and theme. With your permission, we load analytics to measure usage. Read our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> and <cookieLink>Cookie Policy</cookieLink>.
consent.preferencesDialogDesc: Choose which cookies we may use. Essential cookies are required for sign-in and cannot be disabled.
consent.essentialDesc: Required for sign-in and core app functionality.
consent.analyticsDesc: Anonymous usage and performance metrics via Vercel (only if you opt in).

metadata.title: ahead — know what's due ahead
metadata.description: Track subscriptions, rent, loans, and bills. See your upcoming payments by month.
